content: The self-attention mechanism allows a Transformer model to weigh the significance of different words in a sequence relative to a specific target word. Unlike previous recurrent architectures that processed data linearly, self-attention enables the model to capture long-range dependencies and contextual relationships simultaneously across the entire input, significantly improving the representation of complex linguistic structures.

key_points: The self-attention mechanism allows a Transformer model to weigh the significance of different words in a sequence relative to a specific target word.

Unlike previous recurrent architectures that processed data linearly, self-attention enables the model to capture long-range dependencies and contextual relationships simultaneously across the entire input, significantly improving the representation of complex linguistic structures.
